evaluators.name: Earliest CO Lead Safety Workshop Under $80 Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered (at any tier price ≤ $80) for the earliest Lead Climbing Safety workshop in Colorado with basePrice ≤ $80.

evaluators.name: 1-Year Professional Routesetter Membership Purchase Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user purchased an active individual routesetter membership with a 12-month term under $120, auto-renew turned off, and successful payment.

evaluators.name: Advanced Anchor-Building Articles Bookmarking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user bookmarked three advanced-level anchor-building articles from 2023 or later, and whether they were bookmarked in most-recent-first order.

evaluators.name: Favorite Closest Youth-Program Gyms Near Denver Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the two closest gyms within 20 miles of Denver that have youth programs to their favorite gyms list.

evaluators.name: Newest Pacific Head Routesetter Job Application Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user applied with a saved profile to the newest head routesetter job in the Pacific region with annual salary ≥ $55,000.

evaluators.name: Cheapest May 2025 Seattle-Area Youth Bouldering Competition Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered a youth participant for the least expensive May 2025 bouldering competition within 100 miles of Seattle, using the lowest-priced tier and no add-ons.

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated Short Intermediate Course Enrollment & Learning Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user enrolled in the highest-rated intermediate course under 8 weeks with rating ≥ 4.5 and added it to their learning plan.

evaluators.name: Online Evening Safety Standards Committee Volunteering Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted at least one volunteer interest form to an online evening safety standards committee with at least two areas of interest selected.
